name: healthcare-apps
description: CareConnect360, HealthHub Mobile, MedTrack Pro - integrated healthcare apps

scripts.dev:medtrack: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/medtrack-pro/server" "npm run dev -w apps/medtrack-pro/client"
scripts.dev:careconnect: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/care-connect-360/server" "npm run dev -w apps/care-connect-360/client"
scripts.dev:healthhub: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/healthhub-mobile/server" "npm run dev -w apps/healthhub-mobile/client"
